overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a flying vehicle navigating through a cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle flies past holographic billboards and between illuminated skyscrapers with heavy neon lighting and a moody, atmospheric aesthetic characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: flying vehicle interior with view of cyberpunk city billboards

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through the downtown district, passing holographic advertisements

entered.detail: metal window frame and interior paneling of the aerial vehicle
large red holographic billboard displaying a samurai demon face with Japanese text
vertical holographic sign with 'PACIFICA' text in red neon
tall dark building silhouette visible through the rain and haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from inside a flying vehicle at night, with the interior frame visible in the foreground. Outside, holographic billboards including a prominent red samurai face and 'PACIFICA' signage illuminate the right side of the view, while distant skyscrapers fade into the hazy darkness on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: flying alongside high-rise building with illuminated grid windows

events.description: vehicle approaches and begins flying alongside a large multi-story building with grid-patterned illuminated windows

agents.ego_description: navigating the flying vehicle past the large grid building, maintaining altitude while approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: car driving on the wet street below with headlights visible

entered.detail: massive building facade with uniform grid of illuminated windows and blue lighting
elevated highway or bridge structure spanning between buildings ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies alongside a massive high-rise building with a grid of illuminated windows dominating the right side of the frame. The holographic samurai billboard recedes into the distance as the vehicle approaches an overpass structure ahead, with street traffic visible far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon between high-rise buildings with covered overpass

events.description: vehicle enters narrow corridor between buildings passing under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: flying through the confined urban canyon between closely spaced skyscrapers

entered.detail: dark concrete and glass building wall passing closely on the left side
illuminated high-rise building facade with multiple lit windows on the right

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow urban canyon between towering buildings, passing under an overpass structure. The high-rise grid building and holographic billboards disappear from view as the vehicle navigates the confined space between the dark building facades on either side, with distant city lights visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight from a wide, neon-lit cityscape into the claustrophobic depths of a narrow urban canyon. It begins from inside a flying vehicle, where the interior frame borders a view of holographic billboards, including a red samurai face and Pacifica signage, against a hazy night sky. As the vehicle pushes forward, the holograms recede and the perspective shifts to glide alongside a massive high-rise dominated by a grid of glowing windows. The scene then tightens as the vehicle passes under an overpass, leaving the open skyline behind to enter a confined space between towering, dark building facades. Finally, the expansive city lights vanish from the periphery, leaving only a distant glow visible at the end of the shadowed architectural corridor.
